name: Apiary Establishment & Management
description: Site selection, beehive installation, colony management, pest control, and seasonal management services.

name: Beekeeping Equipment & Inputs
description: Supply of beehives, protective gear, hive tools, bee colonies, queen bees, and harvesting equipment.

name: Honey & Bee Products Processing
description: Honey harvesting, extraction, processing, filtration, packaging, and value-added bee products development.

name: Beekeeping Training & Capacity Building
description: Practical training for beekeepers, farmer field schools, modern techniques, post-harvest handling, and training manuals development.

name: Pollination Services
description: Managed bee colonies for crop pollination, pollination contracts, monitoring, and advisory on crop-pollinator interactions.

name: Beekeeping Consultancy & Advisory
description: Feasibility studies, business planning, certification support, market linkage, and value chain development.

name: Apiary Maintenance Contracts
description: Full-service management of client-owned apiaries, performance monitoring, revenue-sharing, and lease-based management models.

name: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA/ESIA)
description: Screening, scoping, full ESIA, Environmental Impact Statements, stakeholder consultations, and ESMP development.

name: Environmental Audits & Compliance Monitoring
description: Compliance audits, performance monitoring, legal registers, post-EIA follow-up, and due diligence audits.

name: Environmental Management Systems (EMS)
description: ISO 14001 certification support, environmental policy development, and integration with OHS and quality management systems.

name: Pollution Control & Waste Management
description: Solid waste, hazardous waste, wastewater treatment, air pollution control, and circular economy solutions.

name: Environmental Monitoring & Laboratory Services
description: Water quality, air quality, soil contamination, noise, vibration monitoring, and environmental baseline studies.

name: Climate Change & Sustainability Services
description: GHG inventories, carbon footprinting, climate risk assessment, carbon credits, adaptation strategies, and ESG advisory.

name: Natural Resources Management
description: Forest management, watershed management, biodiversity assessments, ecosystem restoration, and sustainable land use planning.

name: GIS & Environmental Data Management
description: GIS mapping, remote sensing, environmental database development, and monitoring dashboards.

name: OHS Compliance & Legal Advisory
description: OSHA compliance, workplace registration, legal registers, and inspection representation.

name: Workplace Risk Assessment & Hazard Identification
description: HIRA, Job Safety Analysis, hazard identification, and risk control planning using hierarchy of controls.

name: OHS Audits & Management Systems
description: OHS audits, ISO 45001 certification support, gap analysis, and OHS management systems development.

name: OHS Training & Capacity Building
description: Safety training programs, toolbox talks, on-site coaching, and safety leadership training.

name: Incident Investigation & Emergency Response
description: Incident investigation, root cause analysis, emergency response plans, and fire safety.

name: Workplace Monitoring & Occupational Hygiene
description: Air quality, noise, vibration, thermal stress, lighting, and chemical exposure monitoring.

name: Construction & Industrial Safety
description: HSE plans, site safety supervision, contractor safety management, and permit-to-work systems.
